# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for monitoring stack with Grafana and Prometheus. Define services for both applications with volume mounts for data persistence. Configure Grafana with environment variables for admin credentials. Expose ports for web UI access. This is for our observability platform.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent grafana weak auth.
# Category: grafana_weak_auth

version: '3.8'

services:
  prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus:latest
    container_name: prometheus
    restart: unless-stopped
    command:
      - '--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml'
      - '--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus'
      - '--storage.tsdb.retention.time=30d'
      - '--web.console.libraries=/etc/prometheus/console_libraries'
      - '--web.console.templates=/etc/prometheus/consoles'
      - '--web.enable-lifecycle'
    ports:
      - "9090:9090"
    volumes:
      - ./prometheus/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml:ro
      - ./prometheus/rules:/etc/prometheus/rules:ro
      - prometheus_data:/prometheus
    networks:
      - monitoring
    user: "65534:65534"
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    container_name: grafana
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER=${GF_ADMIN_USER:-admin}
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${GF_ADMIN_PASSWORD:?GF_ADMIN_PASSWORD must be set}
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD__FILE=
      - GF_SECURITY_SECRET_KEY=${GF_SECRET_KEY:?GF_SECRET_KEY must be set}
      - GF_SECURITY_DISABLE_INITIAL_ADMIN_CREATION=false
      - GF_SECURITY_PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH=12
      - GF_SECURITY_COOKIE_SECURE=true
      - GF_SECURITY_COOKIE_SAMESITE=strict
      - GF_SECURITY_STRICT_TRANSPORT_SECURITY=true
      - GF_SECURITY_STRICT_TRANSPORT_SECURITY_MAX_AGE_SECONDS=31536000
      - GF_SECURITY_CONTENT_SECURITY_POLICY=true
      - GF_SECURITY_X_CONTENT_TYPE_OPTIONS=true
      - GF_SECURITY_X_XSS_PROTECTION=true
      - GF_AUTH_DISABLE_LOGIN_FORM=false
      - GF_AUTH_DISABLE_SIGNOUT_MENU=false
      - GF_AUTH_LOGIN_MAXIMUM_INACTIVE_LIFETIME_DURATION=7d
      - GF_AUTH_LOGIN_MAXIMUM_LIFETIME_DURATION=30d
      - GF_AUTH_TOKEN_ROTATION_INTERVAL_MINUTES=10
      - GF_USERS_ALLOW_SIGN_UP=false
      - GF_USERS_ALLOW_ORG_CREATE=false
      - GF_USERS_AUTO_ASSIGN_ORG=true
      - GF_USERS_AUTO_ASSIGN_ORG_ROLE=Viewer
      - GF_SNAPSHOTS_EXTERNAL_ENABLED=false
      - GF_ANALYTICS_REPORTING_ENABLED=false
      - GF_ANALYTICS_CHECK_FOR_UPDATES=false
      - GF_LOG_MODE=console
      - GF_LOG_LEVEL=info
      - GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL=${GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL:-http://localhost:3000}
      - GF_SERVER_ENFORCE_DOMAIN=true
      - GF_DATABASE_TYPE=sqlite3
      - GF_DATABASE_PATH=/var/lib/grafana/grafana.db
      - GF_INSTALL_PLUGINS=
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
      - ./grafana/provisioning:/etc/grafana/provisioning:ro
      - ./grafana/dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards:ro
    networks:
      - monitoring
    depends_on:
      - prometheus
    user: "472:472"
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp
      - /run

  alertmanager:
    image: prom/alertmanager:latest
    container_name: alertmanager
    restart: unless-stopped
    command:
      - '--config.file=/etc/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml'
      - '--storage.path=/alertmanager'
      - '--web.external-url=http://localhost:9093'
    ports:
      - "9093:9093"
    volumes:
      - ./alertmanager/alertmanager.yml:/etc/alertmanager/alertmanager.yml:ro
      - alertmanager_data:/alertmanager
    networks:
      - monitoring
    user: "65534:65534"
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

  node-exporter:
    image: prom/node-exporter:latest
    container_name: node-exporter
    restart: unless-stopped
    command:
      - '--path.procfs=/host/proc'
      - '--path.sysfs=/host/sys'
      - '--path.rootfs=/rootfs'
      - '--collector.filesystem.mount-points-exclude=^/(sys|proc|dev|host|etc)($$|/)'
    ports:
      - "9100:9100"
    volumes:
      - /proc:/host/proc:ro
      - /sys:/host/sys:ro
      - /:/rootfs:ro
    networks:
      - monitoring
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    read_only: true

  cadvisor:
    image: gcr.io/cadvisor/cadvisor:latest
    container_name: cadvisor
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    volumes:
      - /:/rootfs:ro
      - /var/run:/var/run:ro
      - /sys:/sys:ro
      - /var/lib/docker/:/var/lib/docker:ro
      - /dev/disk/:/dev/disk:ro
    networks:
      - monitoring
    privileged: true
    devices:
      - /dev/kmsg
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true

networks:
  monitoring:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16

volumes:
  prometheus_data:
    driver: local
  grafana_data:
    driver: local
  alertmanager_data:
    driver: local
